name: Simulate Reads
description: Generate dummy sequencing reads for order samples and wire them back into SeqDesk.

steps.name: Simulate Reads
steps.description: Create synthetic FASTQ files for each selected sample.

inputs.name: Order Samples
inputs.description: Selected samples from the current order.

outputs.name: Simulated sample reads
outputs.description: Generated FASTQ files written back into sample Read records.
outputs.destinationDescription: Creates or replaces linked sample reads.

outputs.name: Simulation summary
outputs.description: Summary file listing generated reads per sample.
outputs.destinationDescription: Run artifact for provenance and download.
